title: Camera Enhancements
description: A collection of camera related client side gameplay enhancements (freecam, freelook)
body:
Currently there are two implemented camera features. Freecam and Freelook. Configuration menu is accessible through [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) or via a keybind (by default unset). All the keybinds are configurable in the usual *'Key Binds...'* menu.

## Freecam

Pressing a **V** key enables you to leave your body and freely move the camera as in spectator mode. To keep this as survival friendly as possible while in freecam you cannot go through blocks or interact with anything. it does *not* however prevent movement/interaction with your player by outside forces. Meaning activating freecam won't save you from falling to your death.

Pressing a **B** key with any of the hotbar keys (eg. **B+1**) saves the camera position into that corresponding slot. If you then press **N** key with a hotbar key that has a position saved (eg. **N+1**) a freecam tripod mode will be activated, meaning the camera with be locked to that position while allowing you to move around.

## Freelook

While holding **left Alt** key you can freely rotate the camera around your player model without changing the direction of the player. Quite useful for elytra flying or quickly looking back.

---

I'm open to any suggestions on new features or updates to existing ones. Keep in mind though that I want this mod to remain somewhat survival friendly.
